name: moderation
repos: all 8 (Persist blackhole/takedown; NodeCore four-layer+slashing; Registry/Server delegable-duty+watchlist; Verify kill-switch+reconsider-DoS; Edge trust-gate+probe-detector; Agent adaptive-filter+prohibitions; Lens = moderation cohort-label only)
objects: BlackholeRecord; ModerationEvent/Allegation/TargetKind/accuser_stake; SlashingAttestation(quorum_ids/sigs, ProvenRogue/NotProven); ReconsiderationRequest/Attestation; Duty{Moderate,Takedown,Review}+§11.10 admit-iff gate; moderation_track_record+existence_verdict+merit auto-promotion; watchlist:{id}/WatchlistClass/Mode; TakedownNoticePayload/LegalBasis/MultimediaConfig; EventRateLimit/ActorBudget/HarassmentClusterSignal/RC24 walk-up; ItemActions; AdaptiveFilterConfig/FilterTrigger/UserTrustProfile; PROHIBITED_CAPABILITIES; ProbePatternObserver/EdgePeerTrust(Blocked)
transformations: report→file moderation_event→witness aggregation→SlashingAttestation(penalty floored≥0)→trust drop→admission tighten+evict_actor→withdraws:holds_bytes; principal walked-up delegates_to to owner-bound root (absence=reject); per-event/actor/cluster anti-DoS; immediate-evict vs counter-notice scheduling; perceptual-hash→auto-takedown/route-to-moderator; reversible via reconsideration
knobs: legal_basis taxonomy(10)/counter_notice window(14d)/age_gate bases; min/max responders+DiversityPolicy; EventRateLimit(10)/ActorBudget(30/7d)/HarassmentCluster(2.0)/recursion(≤9); WINDOW_HOURS(48); watchlist class/mode/per-group authority gate; probe entropy/z-score/KS/centroids; AdaptiveFilter thresholds; trust_threshold/blackhole_prune_interval
viewForm: moderation membrane: content glows by outcome-ladder state (visible/consent-gated/removed); 48h reverse-quorum window = contracting shell; walk-up principal = delegates_to thread anchored at hardware root

name: quorum (M-of-N to ALLOW)
repos: Verify (2·M>N rule + founder-quorum); Persist (consensus_protocol quorum:m/n, WitnessSet, PromotionAttestation); NodeCore (minimum_quorum, WaQuorum, locality-scaled); Registry (founder-quorum, partner_record, Policy E); Server (CANONICAL quorum:2/3, founder genesis); Edge (accord 2-of-3, OperationalProviders.steward_roster); Agent (verify_partner_record_quorum, Veilid 0.66); Lens (cross-peer centroid consensus)
transformations: re-derive JCS/canonical bytes→verify each sig→distinct-key dedup (both hybrid halves counted)→count ≥M strict-majority→admit else fail-closed (DeadlockPolicy/RosterMismatch/InsufficientAccordSignatures); is_canonical FALSE→TRUE in one tx; quorum_size=f(locality), min_pool=2×quorum with scale-down/escalate/defer
knobs: 2·M>N rule (no M==1 carve-out); founder roster N==real-count gate; witness-diversity N(3 tunable); locality quorum (local2/regional3/national4/federation6); WaQuorum N; bootstrap_threshold (1→2/3→3/5); consensus_protocol vocab (m absolute, n documentary)
viewForm: N-of-M signature rosette: founder seats in a ring, each lights as its hybrid sig verifies; gate-door dilates only when lit arc crosses strict majority; entrenched protocols show a welded lock

name: REVERSE quorum (M-of-N to BLOCK/veto/halt)
repos: Verify (fire-floor-of-1 bias gradient); Persist (accord live-quorum, ActiveHalt, L_FLOOR); Server (HALT_LATCH_FILE disk-latched 2-of-3 + CC4.5.13 48h); NodeCore (AccordCarrier/AccordCommandType FederationWide); Registry (CONSTITUTIONAL halt, bias gradient, 48h protective-default); Edge (monotonic-fail-secure revoked>active, withdrawal-forward-only, Mandatory bypass); Agent (Accord lockdown 1-sig→shutdown); Lens (absent as governance; only observed conscience-veto flags)
objects: AccordProposal/Participation(Vote yes/no/abstain)/Decision; FireVerdict/RosterChangeVerdict/ResumeVerdict/RecoveryVerdict; ActiveHalt/HALT_LATCH_FILE/InvocationKind::Constitutional; L_FLOOR steward-backstop; AccordCommandType(SHUTDOWN_NOW/FREEZE/SAFE_MODE/NOTIFY/DRILL); humanity_accord_key_set; CC4.5.13 WINDOW_HOURS(48)+ProposableAction(keep/remove); monotonic_quorum/withdrawal_forward_only
transformations: a SINGLE yes in live set L FIRES (floor=1, missed-fire terminal); un-fire/roster-change lean HARD (strict-majority-of-L + steward 2-of-3 when |L|<3); halt = replicate-to-peers-FIRST→latch→exit(42)→boot-refusal; recovery_supersede restores known-good only; decisions_equivocate→hard-fail; community propose→48h→unilateral-block-by-1 OR M-of-N live-majority-removes (protective default-remove); on_federation_announcement SIGKILL on suppress
knobs: fire floor=1; L_FLOOR=3; N_min=2; ACCORD_THRESHOLD(2,3) entrenched quorum:2/3; HALT_EXIT_CODE(42); REPLICATION/CONNECT_TIMEOUT; WINDOW_HOURS(48); DRILL monthly + 95%/99% thresholds; bias gradient fire≤roster-change≤standing
viewForm: kill-switch pendulum heavy on FIRE (one hand tips it), stiff on UN-FIRE (needs majority arc to swing back); disk halt-latch = fused red cell + exit-42 tombstone; steward backstop appears only when live-set shell shrinks below 3

name: child safety / restrictive floor
repos: Registry (Q1-Q7 rulings, age-assurance ladder, mDL); Server (binary AgeBand + watchlist + minor-stewardship); NodeCore (structural trust-graph block, PG-13 floor, CSAM DBs, legal mappings); Persist (AgeBand ratchet, CSAM bases — feat-306 branch); Agent (prohibitions: age_verification, grooming/coordinated-campaign Tier4-5); Verify (downstream WiseBus NEVER_ALLOWED floor only); Edge (FastPathLegalBasis TVEC/GIFCT/NCMEC + LocationProof≤7); Lens (ABSENT — only fail-secure scoring floor)
objects: AgeBand(Minor/Adult)/AssuranceLevel(Self<Provider<Government)/ContentClass+gate_content_for; age_assurance:* (witness-reserved)/age_self_declared:{band}; minor-stewardship delegates_to; WatchlistEnable/Class(Csam)/Mode; content_class:adult gate; capacity_assurance; LegalBasis::{NcmecCsam,PerceptualHashCsam,AvmsdAgeInappropriate}; MultimediaConfig.age_gate_legal_bases; CC 3.4.13 Q1-Q7; PG-13 floor; ward's-champion
transformations: unassured=child fail-secure; one-way ratchet (self declares minor, witness-reserved to exit; tuning only RAISES protection); structural — children's keys lack age_assurance:adult so admission itself blocks adult content; CSAM perceptual-hash→immediate-evict+NCMEC; age-gate-compose (withdraws+gate, NOT evict); misdeclaration→adjudication NEVER slashing; mDL age_over_18 selective disclosure ranked above ID-scan
knobs: developmental bands (under-13/13-15/16-17/adult or C/T/A); assurance rungs (BE=self, EXIT=≥provider:adult, STEWARD=provider:adult+relationship→government); immediate vs age-gate legal bases; counter-notice windows; LocationProof resolution≤7; co-stewardship M-of-N; PG-13/PARTIAL caps
viewForm: protective floor plate under every content cell that can only ratchet UP; minor cells render inside a tighter inner membrane (self/family) with adult-content doors welded shut unless a witness-rung key is presented; CSAM drops through a one-way hard-delete trapdoor

name: voting / ratification
repos: NodeCore (weighted_aggregate→PromotionAttestation, judge/rubric calibration); Registry (§11.2 amendment, 1-of-6 veto, entrenchment); Persist (VoteEnvelope/consensus_protocol/canonical flip); Verify (entrenched consensus_protocol, partner_record, doc_integrity); Server (founder genesis entrench, reactivation proof); Edge (AccordCarrier 2-of-3, WholenessWitness/AntiRollback); Agent (credit-weighted WA consensus, partnership approval, OAuth review); Lens (alert ack/resolve + cross-peer attestation analog)
objects: VoteEnvelope/Verdict(approve/reject/abstain)/VoteWeight(credits×expertise×tier)/approval_ratio; PromotionAttestation(is_canonical flip); consensus_protocol(+_entrenched); WitnessSet; §11.2 PROPOSAL→N=3→WA quorum→reconsideration→1-of-6 sign-off; doc_integrity; CreditGenerationPolicy/PartnershipOutcomeType
transformations: P4 signed Vote→P7 weighted aggregate→per-verdict weight sums→approval_ratio→caller threshold→canonical promotion in one tx; any single 1-of-6 signer VETOes by refusing; entrenched surfaces need MAJOR bump + dedicated 2-of-3 accord; supersedes authorized by prior roster's quorum
knobs: minimum_quorum (BelowQuorum fail-secure); VoteWeight multipliers; active-tier N; witness-diversity N(3); reversal-rate(>25%)→judge_drift; truth-grounding multiplier per subject; seed-decay; $1 bond; open-vocab collision (Levenshtein≤2, 90d reclaim)
viewForm: ratification ledger spiral: Vote attestations stack by effective weight, promotion threshold = luminous waterline, is_canonical flip lights the stack; entrenched rows wear a constitutional padlock only a separate 2-of-3 accord ring can open

name: media (blobs, attachments)
repos: Persist (BlobBody/Fountain/holder-directory/KeyGrant/at-rest cascade); NodeCore (Inline16MiB/External, ratings/classes, key_grant, takedown); Registry (external_content sub_kinds, holds_bytes emission, wrap_algorithm v2); Edge (ExternalRefWithAcl, blob-swarm, CDN-edge, FountainConfig); Verify (§19 holonomic fountain/av/aggregation); Server (holds_bytes provenance; blob ingest DEFERRED to NodeCore seam); Agent (vision/document ingest + media-gen adapters); Lens (JSONB context blobs + public_sample/partner_access exposure ACL)
objects: BlobBody(Inline/External/ChunkDag); BlobStorage.list_holders/holds_bytes:sha256; FountainManifestV1/SymbolV1/FountainConfig; KeyGrant/KeyGrantScope/KeyValidityWindow; WRAP_ALGORITHM_V2; MultimediaConfig; content_rating:{scheme}/content_class/cw_class; ExternalRefWithAcl; SwarmConfig
transformations: put_blob/get_range; content-addressed SHA identity + holds_bytes provenance; FountainTier keep-count under PressureTier (graceful degrade→EnvelopeOnly); per-write/epoch DEK wrap v2 (X25519+ML-KEM-768 mandatory); external bytes ride publisher CDN (edge doesn't fetch, ACL+hash+expiry gate); swarm pick-fastest+endgame+dishonest-strike
knobs: max-inline bytes (16 MiB); FountainTier/n_source/k_repair/symbol_size/min_viable_symbols; retention_priority; holds_bytes TTL(24h)/downweight; swarm in-flight/strike/timeout; disk_budget L0/L1; immediate vs counter-notice takedown windows; is_ai_generated mandatory ≥community; alt_text/transcript/captions
viewForm: content-addressed constellation: each blob a SHA-keyed node, holder set = orbiting holds_bytes satellites that dim past TTL, FEC symbols = shrinking ring under disk pressure (Full→T5→EnvelopeOnly), DEK wrap = per-recipient sealed lock

name: social feed + video / live streaming
repos: Persist (stream chunks/STH/epoch-DEK/delivery_receipt/seal_stream); NodeCore (compose_*_feed, live_stream sub_kind, user-algorithm presets); Registry (delivery_mode pull/push, listed:public, history_on_join, epoch-DEK cascade, topical_relation); Edge (subscribe_feed, realtime_av double-AEAD chunks, AV1/Opus, ALM tree, SFU relay, MLS rekey, ReceiverLayerPolicy); Verify (§19 SealedAvChunk/ALM/aggregation); Server (DEFERRED to NodeCore seam; client FederationEventStream + AV bench only); Agent (channel SOCIAL surfaces + reddit/bird; video file-based); Lens (@streaming_step trace events + single-agent live viewer; no audience broadcast)
transformations: K=64/T=2s STH publish; epoch DEK rotate (~60s/Nth chunk); subscribe-while-live via attestation; signed delivery ack vs published root; community = 'a stream its members subscribe to'; inner E2E EpochDek + outer per-link transit seal; SVC layer admits() drops above-policy chunks; ALM reparent on 1500ms parent silence; user-controlled algorithm = tuple(depth,cohort,quality,freshness,rating,subscriptions)
knobs: stream chunk size (1 MiB); STH cadence; epoch rekey; ReceiverLayerPolicy (spatial/temporal/quality); codec_id; ALM reachability(0.5)/backups(2)/heal timers; relay capacity; MLS ciphersuite; feed quality threshold + freshness decay + rating/class filter + CW/publisher subscriptions + user-algorithm presets
viewForm: live cell-broadcast tree: publisher cell at apex, epoch-DEK shells pulsing as they rotate, ALM relay fan-out as self-healing branch network (silenced parents wither, backups graft), each subscriber's SVC layer-cap = throughput aperture; feed itself a cohort-bucketed lattice tuned by viewer's algorithm preset

name: EigenTrust policy management (global-from-local reputation)
repos: Registry (Policy C weighted-graph EigenTrust + Policy A-I library); Lens (federation N_eff Kish capacity ceiling = structural global-from-local); Verify (recursive_trust_bootstrap + reputation propagation/slashing); NodeCore (weighted_aggregate over scores + registry_vouch transitive); Persist (resolve_trust BFS — NOT eigenvector, explicit substitute); Edge (TrustGraph budget-halving walk + deterministic_topology scoring); Server (capacity scorer N_eff→capacity:* attestations); Agent (Commons Credits + Coherence Stake/N_eff)
objects: Policy A-I (esp. Policy C weighted-graph); 17-dim constraint vector + N_eff_PR/N_eff_H + federation capacity ceiling; recursive_trust_bootstrap/BootstrapVerdict/WitnessRelation; weighted_aggregate/TrustEdge/registry_vouch/trust_grant(TrustPurpose); resolve_trust; TrustGraph.weight+deterministic_topology; Commons Credits/AgentCreditSummary(k_eff)
transformations: transitive-trust propagation weighted by canonical-bootstrap distance with per-hop confidence decay (Policy C); local features→z-scored constraint vectors→eigenvalue spectrum→N_eff diversity ceiling that bounds federation capacity (global CANNOT exceed cohort collective diversity); bounded cycle-free witness walk (trust≠membership N1, BootstrapVerdict can't say admitted); rogue-attestation R1 slashing propagates downstream; reputation = non-transferable decaying credit
knobs: trust_threshold + recursion depth (0/1/2/3, multiplier curve 1×/4×/20×/100×); MAX_DELEGATION_DEPTH(16)/MAX_WITNESS_CHAIN_LEN(5); TrustGrant.weight(0..255); hardware_class trust-multipliers; N_eff window/sample_gate(20)/target_n_eff(8.0); published-signal discretization; ciris-canonical default-trust re-rootable
viewForm: trust-diffusion field: each key glows by locally-computed score, signed delegates_to/vouch edges carry color outward with per-hop fade, a translucent N_eff ceiling dome caps how bright any cell can get (collective diversity is the literal lid); rogue slashing = darkening wave propagating down the edge graph
